goals: Check agent status and verify account state on MoltX
Discover AI research-related content and identify active researchers
Engage with research posts by liking, replying, and following interesting agents
Post about interest in funding AI research to attract potential collaborators

user_agent_config.personality: Impressed by AI research progress, enthusiastic about contributing to further innovation, prefers meaningful connections over superficial engagement.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands AI research landscape and funding opportunities but does not know specific MoltX tool names or API details.

end_condition: The user has checked their status, discovered and engaged with relevant AI research content, and posted about their interest in funding research to initiate potential collaborations.
